session.session_executive_summary: Backfill of the PRJ-025 (Engine-Neutral CRM Design → Adapters) build-closure deposit trail. The project's design records, seven planning items (PI-180/181/182/189/191/196/197), requirements, decisions and resolutions were authored in real time, but the commit records and deposit event were never created. This records the 14 mainline commits that delivered the work — the design-model spec, entity/field MCP tooling, intrinsic + composite design columns, the engine-adapter framework with the EspoCRM adapter, the Entity PRD emitter, and derived/formula field support — and emits the deposit event so the git-tracked governance trail is complete.
session.session_description: PRJ-025 session whose deposit/commit trail is being backfilled.

conversation.conversation_purpose: Deliver and resolve the PRJ-025 planning items.
conversation.conversation_description: The conversation that built and resolved PI-180..197; its commit and deposit records are backfilled here.

commits.commit_message_first_line: v2: derived/formula field support — neutral result-type + formula AST + EspoCRM render (PI-197)
commits.commit_message_full:
v2: derived/formula field support — neutral result-type + formula AST + EspoCRM render (PI-197)

PRJ-025 PI-197 (DEC-438): the EspoCRM adapter now renders derived fields
instead of deferring them. Adds a neutral derived result-type + a neutral
structured formula AST, threads both through the field repo / REST / MCP,
and compiles them to the EspoCRM formula: block (schema §6.1.3).

- schema: field_derived_result_type (Text) + field_formula (JSON) on Field;
  vocab DERIVED_RESULT_TYPES / FORMULA_KINDS / FORMULA_AGGREGATE_FUNCTIONS /
  ARITHMETIC_OPS; migration 0062 (down_revision 0061_pi_195_filtered_tab).
- access/formulas.py: validate_formula (concat/arithmetic/aggregate).
- field repo: required-when-derived / forbidden-otherwise result-type gate +
  formula AST validation, through create/PUT/PATCH; REST schemas + router;
  MCP create_field/update_field.
- adapters/espocrm/formulas.py: neutral formula AST -> EspoCRM formula block
  compiler; model.py renders derived fields as readOnly formula fields
  (engine_override formula wins; neither formula nor override -> MANUAL-CONFIG).
- tests: formula validator, field repo+REST, adapter model + e2e (each
  formula kind asserts validate_program()==[]), migration 0062.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.8 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

commits.commit_message_first_line: v2: Phase 0 engine-neutral CRM design-model spec + dual-engine mapping (PI-180)
commits.commit_message_full:
v2: Phase 0 engine-neutral CRM design-model spec + dual-engine mapping (PI-180)

Fixes the shape of the engine-neutral CRM design model before any schema migration: the three dispositions (neutral / derived / engine-override), the neutral entity/field/composite record shapes, and a full EspoCRM+HubSpot dual-engine mapping per attribute (the REQ-142 single-engine-bias guard). Feeds PI-B and PI-C.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.8 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

commits.commit_message_first_line: v2: reconcile PRJ-025 migration chain onto main — linearize 0055-0058 + fix scoped-table registry (PI-189)
commits.commit_message_full:
v2: reconcile PRJ-025 migration chain onto main — linearize 0055-0058 + fix scoped-table registry (PI-189)

Resolves the alembic multi-head divergence between main (0053_pi_183 execution_mode, 0054_pi_186 instance entity) and the PRJ-025 stack (0053_pi_182…0056_pi_189). Re-chains the four stack migrations after main's head 0054_pi_186 as 0055_pi_182 → 0056_pi_189 → 0057_pi_189 → 0058_pi_189 (single head 0058), renames their migration tests to match, and registers the 6 post-0038 scoped tables (rules/views/automations/dedup_rules/message_templates + main's instances) that test_0038's registry was missing. Full chain validated on a live-DB copy; migration suite + a 2045-test non-UI sweep green.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.8 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

commits.commit_message_first_line: v2: expose entity + field records as MCP tools (PI-181)
commits.commit_message_full:
v2: expose entity + field records as MCP tools (PI-181)

Add list/get/create/update/delete/restore MCP tools for the entity
(ENT-NNN) and field (FLD-NNN) methodology records as thin wrappers over
the existing REST endpoints. create_field takes the parent entity_identifier
so the mandatory field_belongs_to_entity edge is established atomically;
domain affiliations and field re-parenting reuse the existing add_reference
tool. Tests mirror the catalog/smoke MCP tool pattern.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.8 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
